title: CSES Problem Set
description: Source-backed CSES solution archive with original summaries, rendered editorials, pseudocode when it helps, and exact C++ implementations.
statementPolicy: Official CSES statements are linked on every page instead of being mirrored here.

startHere.label: Weird Algorithm
startHere.description: The archive starts with the opening Introductory Problems so the workflow can scale cleanly to later categories.

categories.title: Introductory Problems
categories.description: Short constructive, simulation, and arithmetic tasks that make good first passes for the archive.

categories.title: Sorting and Searching
categories.description: Order statistics, greedy scheduling, binary search, and multiset-driven problem solving.

categories.title: Dynamic Programming
categories.description: Counting, optimization, and state-transition problems where the recurrence matters as much as the code.

categories.title: Graph Algorithms
categories.description: Traversal, shortest paths, connectivity, DAG reasoning, and graph decomposition techniques.

categories.title: Range Queries
categories.description: Fenwick trees, segment trees, sparse tables, and offline ideas for interval-heavy tasks.

categories.title: Tree Algorithms
categories.description: Subtree aggregation, rerooting, LCA, and other tree-specific techniques.

categories.title: Mathematics
categories.description: Number theory, modular arithmetic, counting formulas, and constructive math.

categories.title: String Algorithms
categories.description: Pattern matching, automata, rolling hashes, suffix structures, and combinatorics on strings.

categories.title: Geometry
categories.description: Coordinate geometry, intersections, orientation tests, convex hulls, and sweepline reasoning.

categories.title: Advanced Techniques
categories.description: Harder combinations of data structures, optimizations, and structural observations.

categories.title: Additional Problems
categories.description: Mixed follow-on problems that extend beyond the core category ladder.
